name: instant-api — team.deletion_failed > 0 (1h) [manual reconcile]
description: Page on any team.deletion_failed event in a rolling 1h window. A failed deletion means the tombstone job partially executed (some resources destroyed, some not) and a human needs to reconcile state before the customer files a support ticket. The audit kind is emitted by api/internal/handlers/team.go in the W7-D deletion flow when the tombstone worker hits a backend that refuses to drop a database/redis/mongo user.

nrql.query: SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service = 'api' AND audit_kind = 'team.deletion_failed'
